prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The Ending Rough Sleeping Risk Assessment Tool (ERSRAT) is focused on local authorities in England and is aligned with specific UK legislation applicable there, such as the Housing Act 1996. It does not apply to Scotland, which has its own separate legal framework and policies regarding homelessness and housing support.
